biological_replicate: intravenous administration of recombinant DPPIII in diabetic db/db mice
technical_replicate: DPPIII (10 μg/g body weight) or PBS was intravenously injected into mice through the tail vein three times weekly
experimental_design: We first examined whether DPPIII administration affected any phenotypes of the diabetic model mice.
factor_value: diabetic db/db mice and PBS as a control
number_of_biological_replicates: C57BL/6, nondiabetic (db/m; BKS.Cg-m+/+Leprdb/Jcl) and diabetic (db/db; BKS.Cg-+Leprdb/+Leprdb/Jcl) mice
